dag_flow_prompt: Add RBAC role management. Create Admin and User roles, and secure routes so only Admins can create or delete tasks.
baseline_prompt: Add RBAC role management. Create Admin and User roles, and secure routes so only Admins can create or delete tasks.

user_context.persona: a backend developer building a task management REST API that already has JWT authentication

feature_requirements.admin_creation: Manually promoted in the user store or via an ENV-seeded admin account (ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD). No self-registration as Admin.
feature_requirements.role_storage: Add a 'role' field to the existing in-memory user model
feature_requirements.role_enforcement: Middleware function checkRole('Admin') applied to protected routes
feature_requirements.error_response: HTTP 403 with JSON { error: 'Forbidden' } when role check fails

user_context.answering_style: Direct. One decision at a time. No elaboration unless asked.
